meta.title: Our Fleet | Car & SUV Rentals in Fort Lauderdale & Miami
meta.description: Browse economy through newer premium cars and SUVs for rent in Fort Lauderdale, Miami, and South Florida. Every vehicle cleaned and inspected before your trip. Book online.

hero.title: Our South Florida rental fleet
hero.subtitle: Choose from practical economy vehicles and newer premium options — every one privately owned, professionally cleaned, detailed, and inspected before your trip, and chosen for real South Florida driving.

areaLinks.title: Renting in a specific area?
areaLinks.subtitle: See location-specific pickup details, vehicle suggestions, and local trip ideas.

grid.empty: We're refreshing our live availability. Please check back soon or
